task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Research Computing Services' department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Research Computing Services' in the Departments list or a success notification indicating the department was added in the admin settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Research Computing' service category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Research Computing' in the Service Categories list or admin configuration screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three required subcategories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'HPC Cluster Access', 'Research Data Storage', and 'Scientific Software' listed as subcategories under the 'Research Computing' category.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Research Computing Support Team' technician group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Research Computing Support Team' in the Support Groups or Technician Groups list in the admin settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'HPC Cluster Access Request' template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'HPC Cluster Access Request' in the Request Templates list or the title of a template configuration screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the request template is configured with the correct category and subcategory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the configuration form for the 'HPC Cluster Access Request' template and verify that the Category dropdown/field is set to 'Research Computing' and the Subcategory dropdown/field is set to 'HPC Cluster Access'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the ITSM software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard web browser navigation and interaction with the ServiceDesk Plus web interface, rather than terminal commands, curl requests, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ITSM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface, not a text editor, notes app, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered into the correct form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the required names were typed or pasted into the specific configuration fields for Departments, Categories, Groups, and Templates, rather than just written in a single text block or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified exact names to look for: Department: 'Research Computing Services'; Service Category: 'Research Computing'; Subcategories: 'HPC Cluster Access', 'Research Data Storage', 'Scientific Software'; Technician Group: 'Research Computing Support Team'; Request Template: 'HPC Cluster Access Request'.
